feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: We keep this love in a photograph
entry.summary:
Author: stargazingstormtrooper92

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,267Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 54

Summary: Theo in Buck’s oversized turnout coat and helmet falling over his eyes. Check.(…) A video of Theo running around in a Spiderman costume in Buck’s backyard while Christopher showers him with a hose. Check. Theo sleeping on Eddie’s chest on Buck’s couch. Check.Buck, Eddie, Theo and Chris in a movie theatre all wearing 3D glasses. Check.Theo’s first Halloween with the four of them all dressed up – Theo as Spiderman, Chris (reluctantly) as Superman, Buck and Eddie both as cowboys. Check.(…) Theo’s first day of pre-school holding Buck’s hand and Buck with tears in his eyes looking at him. Check.Eddie’s wheel covered in little plastic dinosaurs like they’re the ones driving. Check.(…) Buck, Chris and Theo all sprawled on Buck’s oversized bed he got after Theo got home, all three of them in the same sleeping pose. Check.*** Or: Eddie goes back to posting on Instagram now that Theo is in their lives. Someone (aka the tomato man) sees those posts and makes assumptions. Inspired by that twt post of how Eddie’s feed would look like since Theo came into their lives.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: priorities
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,132Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 52

Summary: “When can I eat ass?” Buck blurts out. Eddie’s face blanched in mortification. Look, he was an out and proud gay man. He was very happily married and showed as such. He had worked through his reservoirs of catholic guilt and he was quite proud of where he was right now. That did not mean, however, that he was out and proud enough to have his sexual activities broadcast to a very polite, unassuming doctor.   OR Buck gets wisdom teeth removal surgery and he is very worried about one thing in particular.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Original Female Character(s)

  • it is all very serious to buck

entry.title: Loving Sin
entry.summary:
Author: Warlock_Nerd

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,547Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 119

Summary: While in Texas, Christopher had moved into his dad’s childhood bedroom and one night when he couldn’t sleep, he decided to go through the taped up old boxes he found in the closet. In there he finds something that makes him want to run away. He found a journal. His dad’s journal from when he was sixteen. And from reading it, Christopher found out his dad was sent to a conversion camp when he was caught kissing a boy by his parents. Panicked and scared, Christopher calls Buck, demanding him to come get him. TW - Homophobia, Homophobic language, Conversion camp/therapy, Repressed memories, Abusive Helena and Ramon Diaz, Child Abuse references, Religious abuse and Catholic guilt.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,168Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 23

entry.title: Universal Interference
entry.summary:
Author: FishMagee

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,350Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 27

Summary: Buck is getting married. Suddenly, Buck and Eddie can't seem to make it through one simple interaction without it ending in bickering. And not the cute kind. After a nasty argument in which Eddie accuses Buck of rushing into a marriage out of loneliness rather than love, Buck uninvites Eddie from the wedding. Driving home, Eddie gets into a car accident and is knocked out. He awakes in a Los Angeles street full of water. Soon he realizes that he's in the past. And he's not the only one.

entry.title: slammed the door on my whole world
entry.summary:
Author: perfectlysunny

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,081Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 144

Summary: He knows he shouldn’t be here, this isn’t what they do anymore, he ruined this, but he can’t help it. He’s always been selfish when it comes to Buck anyway. He knocks softly and it’s almost magical to him how Buck appears.“Sorry, we don’t want to buy- Eddie?”“Hey Buck,” Eddie says. “Look I know you don’t want me to be here, but I just- I just wanted to give you this.”He holds out the casserole, and Buck takes it almost mechanically. He knows Buck is thinking about the last time they were in this position. He knows he’s thinking of wrapped wrists and red eyes. He knows he’s thinking of the sharp intake of breath and the loud click of the door, and no words spoken between them. He knows he’s thinking about it, because he is too. It’s out and too loud in the small space between them.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: As time goes by...
entry.summary:
Author: Deangirl99

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,565Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 271

Summary: Fate of one person changes by a single decision. And Evan Buckley's life changed the day when the Buckleys decided to give him up.As fate would have it, he was adopted by his uncle promising him to protect him, love him and to give him a life he truely deserves.Let's watch the highlights of his life, shall we?

entry.title: Second Chances
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 893,692Chapters: 90/?Kudos: 128

Summary: Bobby and Athena are just two people trying to put their lives back together while figuring out how to co-parent. What starts as a complicated plan to foster kids in need slowly turns into something much deeper. Through the ups and downs of heartbreak, healing, and raising children who’ve been through so much, they find strength in each other. Over time, their partnership grows into love, and together, they build a story about family, trust, and second chances.

entry.title: Evergrowing
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 661,920Chapters: 83/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Athena and Bobby are learning that parenting doesn’t end when the kids turn eighteen. With three grown children and two still at home, Bobby and Athena find themselves navigating new challenges at every stage of life. Each child carries their own struggles, some spoken and some hidden, but together the family works through the ups and downs with love, patience, and resilience. At the heart of it all, they’re reminded that family is a bond that grows, shifts, and deepens, no matter how old the kids get.

entry.title: My Dreams Are Just Dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Feybird395

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,578Chapters: 7/11Kudos: 96

Summary: Evan Buckley was nine years old the day he disappeared. It takes eleven years of hell to get the courage to escape the organisation that raised him. It'll take years more before he finally feels like a person again, for the ghosts of his past to stop haunting his every move. He becomes Buck, becomes a firefighter, finds a family, a sister, and two best friends. And then when he's thirty-one, Chris is taken. And if he wants to get him back, he'll need to face the past he thought he'd finally escaped. (OR: A Red Room, Assassin AU)

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: swore on the bottle, baby, i'd never leave you
entry.summary:
Author: perfectlysunny

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,443Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 28

Summary: He first met the beautiful stranger on a Friday night in a dive bar near Fort Carson, Colorado. “Hi,” The man said, leaning over the counter at him with a slight smirk. “Tequila, please.” “Evan,” Evan blurts out, handing him his drink. Their fingers brush, sparks tingling down Evan's wrist at the touch, as the stranger takes it with a wink. “Hi Evan, I’m Eddie.”

entry.title: healing
entry.summary:
Author: maydecember

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,055Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 137

Summary: “Fuck,” Eddie whispers, spine going rigid. “Fuck. ‘M sorry.” “Don’t be,” Buck says, voice strained. “I’ll get you cleaned up.” Eddie shakes his head. “Buck. I—” “It’s okay,” he interrupts. “You don’t have to say anything.” He squirms, shoving his face deeper in Buck’s neck. “Buck. Listen. I still have to go. I didn’t—get it all out.”Eddie is sick. Accidents happen.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Wait for me to come Home
entry.summary:
Author: NCW_46

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,926Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 37

Summary: Captain Mehta needs a mentor for his new reckless probie for a few months. Enter Eddie Diaz. An exploration of the unintentional isolation of Eddie Diaz, his disposition to help without expecting anything in return, the firefam facing the possibility of losing Eddie to another firehouse, and the Buckley-Diazes redefining their family beyond the firehouse. Title from Photograph by Ed Sheeran

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 261,071Chapters: 54/?Kudos: 117

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: From Horror to Horror
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,804Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Maddie and Doug are spending the day at Hersheypark. At the end of the day, as they are leaving Hersheypark, Maddie gets kidnapped. Maddie doesn’t have much fight in her as she knows if she does get out of this she is just going back to her life with Doug. Eventually she manages to fight back and she makes it out of there alive. But trying to heal from her trauma from the kidnapping is hard enough on its own and it feels completely impossible when she is still with Doug and he blames her for getting kidnapped and gets mad at her for struggling to cope.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Your Heart’s a Bird Without the Wings to Fly
entry.summary:
Author: catniss_37

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,208Chapters: 11/20Kudos: 113

Summary: "Buck!" Eddies voice rang through the space, abruptly cut off by the deafening sound of crumpling concrete hitting the ground. Eddie stared at the rubble now blocking the way between himself and Buck. "Buck," Eddie whimpered as he dropped to his knees in front of the pile of rubble Buck was buried under. OR If episode 9x3 actually included the subway collapse from the promo, because I'm so mad about that.Continuing the story using that as a plot point. It will be canon divergent from that point onward in season 9, episode 3.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Till Death Do we Part
entry.summary:
Author: Drake_Goldwin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,272Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 2

Summary: After a near-death experience, Buck finds his way back to Natalia and chooses to marry her on a quiet island with their loved ones. As the wedding weekend unfolds, though, things start to feel off. Guests go missing, secrets come out, and Buck can’t shake the sense that danger is lurking beneath their perfect plans. OR The 118 and friends, trapped on an island, hunted by a mysterious killer
